title: The Untold Side Effects of Nicotine

chunks.title: Overview of Smoking Options
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses various smoking options, including cigars, cigarettes, vaping, and marijuana, evaluating their relative risks. Cigars are mentioned as the least risky option, while cigarettes and vaping are criticized for their harmful effects.

chunks.title: Debunking Misconceptions About Nicotine
chunks.summary: A conversation unfolds about the belief that nicotine might be beneficial, as brought up by a friend who claims that smokers contracted COVID less frequently. The speaker explains that while nicotine occurs naturally, there are significant side effects and risks associated with its use.
chunks.transcript: >> Yeah. >> Yeah. Um interesting to see where that's at. You know, a lot of people you you'll hear people talking about nicotine is good for you. Yeah. We're uh even we're in uh DC and we're outside and I see this guy always and you remember this guy? Yeah. I see this one guy always in the morning and at night, Paul, he's in a corner smoking cigarettes. Okay. So, I told him I said, "Hey, John." Both guys name is John.
